diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,165 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: createFactory, createMiddleware, Factory, CreateHandlersInterface
+- Reads as: '../../hono', '../../hono-base', '../../types', '../../utils/handler'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/factory/factory.js
+- Safe summary: Factory helper providing createHandlers and createMiddleware for building custom middleware and handler factories with typed support for handlers up to x10.
+
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
+- Reads as: '../../context', '../../request/constants', '../../types', '../../utils/url'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/route/route.js
+- Safe summary: Provides utilities to inspect matched routes and routing path information within the request context.
+
+## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: defineWebSocketHelper, WSContext, WSReadyState, WSEvents, UpgradeWebSocket
+- Reads as: '../../context', '../../types', '../../utils/http-status'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/websocket/websocket.js
+- Safe summary: WebSocket helper for upgrading HTTP connections to WebSocket and managing events (onOpen, onMessage, onClose, onError).
+
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, generateCookie, setCookie, generateSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie
+- Reads as: '../../context', '../../utils/cookie'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/cookie/cookie.js, src/utils/cookie
+- Safe summary: Cookie handling utilities for reading, writing, and deleting cookies including signed cookies for server-side storage.
+
+## src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: testClient
+- Reads as: '../../client', '../../context', '../../hono', '../../types', '../../utils/types'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/testing/testing.js
+- Safe summary: Creates a test client for Hono apps enabling requests similar to the actual application with mocked fetch behavior.
+
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: env, getRuntimeKey, knownUserAgents, checkUserAgentEquals
+- Reads as: '../../context'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/adapter/bun.ts, src/helper/adapter/deno.ts, src/helper/adapter/node.ts, src/helper/adapter/workerd.ts, src/helper/adapter/other.ts, src/helper/adapter/fastly.ts
+- Safe summary: Detects runtime environment (node, deno, bun, workerd, fastly, etc.) and provides access to environment variables/contexts.
+
+## src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, createCssContext, rawCssString
+- Reads as: '../../helper/html', '../../jsx/constants', '../../jsx/dom/css', '../../utils/html', './common'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Safe summary: CSS-in-JS style helper for generating CSS with automatic unique class names and supporting animations via view transitions.
+
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Main exports or names: css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, className, minify, rawCssString
+- Reads as: (none - standalone utilities)
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/index.ts, src/helper/jsx/dom/css.ts
+- Safe summary: Shared utilities for CSS helper including automatic hash generation for class names, CSS minification, common functions for server and client usage.
+
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: proxy, buildRequestInitFromRequest, preprocessRequestInit, checkUserAgentEquals, knownUserAgents
+- Reads as: '../../http-exception', '../../utils/headers'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/proxy/proxy.ts
+- Safe summary: Proxy helper that wraps Fetch API to proxy requests to another server with proper header handling and compliance to RFC standards.
+
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: showRoutes, getRouterName, inspectRoutes, handlerName, isMiddleware
+- Reads as: '../../hono', '../../types', '../../utils/color', '../../utils/handler'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/dev/dev.ts
+- Safe summary: Development utilities to display app routes and middleware in a formatted table with optional colorization.
+
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: html, raw
+- Reads as: '../../utils/html'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/html/html.js, src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Safe summary: HTML escaping and template string helper supporting mixed safe and unsafe content like JSX with automatic callback resolution.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, (re-exports from ./ssg, ./plugins, ./middleware)
+- Reads as: './ssg', './middleware', './plugins'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Safe summary: Static Site Generation (SSG) helper for pre-rendering pages to static files with support for dynamic parameters and routing.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Main exports or names: toSSG, fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, generateFilePath, defaultPlugin
+- Reads as: '../../client/utils', '../../hono', '../../types', '../../utils/concurrent', './middleware', './utils'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Safe summary: Core SSG logic including fetching all static-generated route content with concurrency and saving files to disk via FileSystemModule interface.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, isDynamicRoute, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, ensureWithinOutDir
+- Reads as: '../../hono', '../../router', '../../types'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Safe summary: Utility functions for SSG including path manipulation, filtering routes for static generation, and checking for dynamic route parameters.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Main exports or names: ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, SSG_CONTEXT, ssgParams, AddedSSGDataRequest
+- Reads as: './utils'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Safe summary: Middleware for SSG enabling dynamic route rendering, SSG context tracking, and disabling SSG for particular routes via headers.
+
+## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE, streamText, SSEStreamingApi, SSEMess
